forecasts.rationale: Extreme Fear (FNG=12) with rising implied vol (DVOL +1.8 to 51.3%) and slightly crowded longs (funding +0.01%) point to near-term downside pressure and elevated uncertainty, justifying a modest negative drift tilt and vol expansion at the 1w horizon; however, extreme fear readings historically act as a mild mean-reversion signal at the 1m and 1y horizons, warranting a small positive drift offset there. Vol multipliers are raised across all horizons reflecting the rising DVOL environment, with the most pronounced widening at 1m. Skew is modestly negative short-term (demand for downside protection) and near-neutral long-term. All adjustments are kept small given near-random-walk dynamics.

signals.interpretation: Fear & Greed 12/100 (Extreme Fear), +1 vs prior reading
Perp funding +0.0100% — longs pay shorts (crowded long)
Deribit implied vol (DVOL) 51.3% annualized, rising (more fear/uncertainty)
